commands: PYTEST_DISABLE_PLUGIN_AUTOLOAD=1 python -m pytest tests/test_author_persist.py tests/test_author_cli.py -v -p no:debugging -p no:cacheprovider --basetemp .pytest-tmp
last_tests_run.result: 10 passed in 3.94s; compile_check OK (81 files); import ok; --help verified

toolchain_notes: Python 3.14 + anyio plugin autoload + Windows = OSError [WinError 10106] at asyncio backend init. Workaround: PYTEST_DISABLE_PLUGIN_AUTOLOAD=1 + explicit -p no:debugging -p no:cacheprovider. Separate follow-up slice should pin pytest plugins or add pyproject.toml pytest config.

crewAI 1.14.2 cannot install on Python 3.14 — pydantic-core/pyo3 hard-caps at Python 3.13. crewAI env must always use Python 3.12 venv at C:\Users\larsv\envs\crewai-env. Do not attempt crewai pip install under Python 3.14.
smoke_crewai.py mcp.__version__ AttributeError is benign — mcp IS installed (crewAI bundled mcp~=1.26.0) but does not expose __version__. Smoke test is otherwise green.

crewai_env.smoke_test: passed (mcp.__version__ AttributeError is benign — mcp is installed)

reactive_resume.role: GUI/editor for structured resumes + JSON interchange surface
reactive_resume.canonical_ownership: stays in JobPipe (evidence selection, claim targeting, narrative constraints)

authoring_mvp_lane.name: T002: AI document authoring MVP (cover letter + tailored CV)
authoring_mvp_lane.position_decision_notes: Option C (hybrid): deterministic contracts + validation stay JobPipe-native. crewAI enters only inside the author/revise agent layer. Data is the product, the engine is JobPipe, agent frameworks are pluggable.

contracts.AuthoringCaseContext: immutable frozen dataclass - candidate + job + evidence bundle going into author
contracts.GeneratedApplicationPackage: pydantic model - cover_letter_draft + tailored_cv_projection + evidence_refs + gap_notes + validation
contracts.DocumentValidationResult: pydantic model - passed + score + failures + warnings

ingest_prep_track.goal: Staged NAV ingest: 100 jobs → 500 → full NAV feed, with manual threshold tuning between stages.
ingest_prep_track.notes: Founder directive 2026-04-23: pause new T002 Sprint 4 slice handoffs until prereqs clear. In-flight work (PR #116, codex/T002-s4b-flow-author) runs to completion naturally. Stage 1+2 collapsed into a single 440-job calibration pass on 2026-04-24 (1305 jobs reached triage after geo/hard-no filters). Artifacts landed in calibration/2026-04-24_n440.*. Threshold tuned 0.30 -> 0.27.

jobsync_purge.notes: Deferred per founder directive 2026-04-24. JobSync sync is a post-application_pack operation — it does NOT block the core triage/parse/match/pack pipeline. Staged ingest runs end-to-end on JobPipe side; JobSync sync is paused until purge research (§3) clears. Reconfirm before first JobSync sync after this ingest.

jobpipe_purge.notes: Archive-based. Runs under JOBPIPE_DATA_DIR only — does NOT touch repo-root profile_pack.md or resume.json. Must run BEFORE import-reactive-resume so the fresh db receives the new candidate_profiles row.

tuning_posture.notes: No first-N-runs autotune exists in code or specs. Threshold tuning is manual between stages. Calibration loop (spec: local-calibration-learning.md) is feedback-driven and only kicks in once user generates signal. Automated tuning moved to backlog research item.

recent_decisions.decision: Staged NAV ingest complete. Full NAV feed processed (11,243 jobs across all drain_queue runs). Calibration artifact: calibration/2026-04-24_nFULL.*. Results: 11,197 SKIP (99.6%), 39 REVIEW_LOW, 3 APPLY, 4 APPLY_STRONGLY. Threshold held at 0.27 — no further tuning warranted. 7 actionable leads identified; 3 with imminent deadlines (OsloMet 2026-04-26, Kartverket 2026-04-26, Arendal 2026-04-28). ingest_prep_track status: ingest_complete. Next: founder reviews APPLY pile, adds overrides.jsonl entries, then T002 Sprint 4 Slice B resumes.
recent_decisions.rationale: drain_queue --only-changed behavior consumed the full queue across combined loops (each loop re-pulls sheet, but since all rows were already hashed in loop 1, subsequent loops got only newly-changed rows = ~0). The full feed was thus processed implicitly. Keep rate 0.41% is within spec for NAV general market. Hard_no pattern candidates identified but deferred to hygiene slice.

recent_decisions.decision: PR #116 (T002 Sprint 4 Slice A — render_cover_letter_docx Node.js subprocess) squash-merged to main at b48c792. Branch codex/T002-s4a-render-docx deleted. PR #96 (WHO_AM_I role split) closed as superseded — intent already landed in subsequent ops/orchestrator-v2 commits. Codex worktree reset to origin/main and cleaned of 24 stale diagnostic .bat/.py files.
recent_decisions.rationale: Audit revealed PR #96 was CONFLICTING and its content had been absorbed into later commits; PR #116 was green, mergeable, and isolated scope (the T002 Sprint 4 pause applied to new handoffs, not to in-flight work). Clearing both unblocks Lars to run Stage 3 without open-PR noise.

recent_decisions.decision: Stage 1+2 closed as a single 440-job calibration pass (1305 jobs reached triage). semantic_filter_threshold lowered 0.30 -> 0.27 in configs/pipeline.v1.yaml. Outcome: 1299 SKIP, 5 REVIEW_LOW, 1 APPLY (Nofence Senior Product Manager - Data & AI). Kongsberg Defence hardware role flagged as false positive by Lars override; candidate for future hard_no_title_regex addition pending Stage 3 confirmation. Profile_pack unchanged — too early + too little APPLY signal.
recent_decisions.rationale: Boundary band 0.27-0.29 held plausible roles (Administrativ koordinator). 99.5% SKIP on NAV general feed is expected; geo filter (52% of skips) + hard_no title (8%) working as designed. Calibration artifact landed per docs/crew-calibration-contract.md v1.0. Stage 3 (500 jobs) is the next tuning-stable checkpoint — watch REVIEW rate: if >15%, nudge threshold back to 0.28.

recent_decisions.decision: JobSync purge deferred from ingest-prep track. Staged NAV ingest (docs/execplans/staged-ingest-2026-04-24.md) runs the core JobPipe pipeline (triage -> parse -> profile_match -> pivot -> moderate -> application_pack) in four stages: 100 -> recalibrate -> 100 -> recalibrate -> 500 -> recalibrate -> full remainder. No JobSync sync during this ingest.
recent_decisions.rationale: JobSync sync is a post-application_pack operation, not a pipeline prerequisite. Purge research (§3 of docs/execplans/jobsync-purge-prep.md) is still owed but no longer blocks intake. Reconfirm purge disposition before the first JobSync sync after this ingest.

recent_decisions.decision: Adopted Job Hunter Crew profile/ folder as JobPipe's authoritative input contract. Mirrored entire folder to <repo_root>/profile/ (profile_pack.md, resume.json, constraints.md, motivation.md, cover_letter_voice.md + .example templates). Code change landed in 3 files: paths.py adds profile_dir() helper and prefers profile/ location in profile_pack_path() + resume_json_path(); candidate_data.py stitches constraints.md + motivation.md onto profile_pack at load time (idempotent, marker-guarded); import_reactive_resume CLI accepts optional positional path and defaults to resume_json_path().
recent_decisions.rationale: profile_pack.md already referenced constraints.md as sibling (seksjon 2 'see constraints.md for the full set') — the multi-file contract was always implied, we just didn't honor it. Single source of truth: edit once in profile/, both Job Hunter Crew and JobPipe see it. cover_letter_voice.md has a home for T002 authoring. motivation.md becomes the canonical strategic_direction source — no more duplicate-into-section-0 workaround.

recent_decisions.decision: CV + profile_pack delivered from CrewAI Job Hunter Crew to repo root (resume.json 19.3 KB JSON Resume 1.0, profile_pack.md 17.4 KB with strategic direction embedded in section 0). Ingest-prep now blocked only on JobSync purge research (§3 of docs/execplans/jobsync-purge-prep.md).
recent_decisions.rationale: Format choice: JSON Resume 1.0. Importer is schema-lenient (only reads basics.name + basics.email), so JSON Resume vs Reactive-Resume native shape is neutral for triage. JSON Resume wins for ATS + author/revise agents: stable community schema. Strategic direction now in profile_pack section 0 explicitly, so triage sees it regardless of whether it reads motivation.md as sibling.

recent_decisions.decision: Open ingest_prep_track: pause new T002 Sprint 4 slice handoffs; in-flight PR #116 and codex/T002-s4b-flow-author run to completion. Prereqs: new CV JSON (waiting on founder), JobSync purge (research-pending, execplan drafted), jobpipe reset-runtime (documented), profile_pack.md manual edit, automated tuning deferred to backlog.
recent_decisions.rationale: Staged NAV ingest takes precedence. Confirmed no autotune-on-first-N-runs exists (specs/local-calibration-learning.md is feedback-driven only). JobSync purge path is undocumented — must be researched and confirmed before any destructive action.

intake_pipeline.dedup: multi-level: within-run, against primary DB, cross-source by job_id/URL
intake_pipeline.suggested_by_platform_semantics: true = bypasses semantic pre-filter (platform already ran candidate-profile match); false = full pipeline

status_scan.description: Scans ATS confirmation emails, classifies applied/interview/rejected, fuzzy-matches to canonical job, writes JobSyncApplicationStatusEvent to DB. Only upgrades status. Closes write-back loop automatically.

suggestions_scan.description: Extracts job URLs from FINN digest and LinkedIn recommendation emails, dedupes, queues with suggested_by_platform=true
